title: goniophlebium lepidopteris
intro: Goniophlebium lepidopteris, also known as the Lepidopteris fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Goniophlebium lepidopteris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, among others. In traditional herbal medicine, Goniophlebium lepidopteris is often prepared as a decoction or a topical paste to harness its medicinal properties.
